channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned Van, 16th May
item.description:
Parked outside 65 manordene Road Abandoned Information vercile from Manchester This is a Rouge van DN70AZR no indecation Of make.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manordene Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees growing and overhanging onto buildings, 16th May
item.description:
Trees could cause damage to these outbuildings. Please clear.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elstree Gardens, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple private trees over growing and blocking the pavement, 16th May
item.description:
Multiple trees over growing and blocking the pavement along the whole length of summer hill
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Park Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime tree regularly over grows and blocks pavement, 16th May
item.description:
Lime tree regularly over grows the eastern pavement at the northern end of prince consort drive
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Park Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in road, 16th May
item.description:
Pothole on road just before junction
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 269, High Street, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole near zebra crossing, 16th May
item.description:
This is getting worse. Now approx 5 inch deep
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 269, High Street, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches overhanging my garden, 16th May
item.description:
I have big branches overhanging from the trees in the alleyway which is a Bexley Council owned right of way into my back garden at 20 Selborne Avenue Bexley. I wonder whether the Council could cut them back for me. I am 81 years old and cannot do it myself. Thank you Mrs Janet Ford
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Selborne Avenue, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain cover is in a dangerous position, 16th May
item.description:
Thank you for re-opening the cycle infrastructure from finchley road to eton avenue, but today I noticed that there is a drain cover that is badly located for cyclists, as it is exactly where cyclists will turn when going from finchley road, to eton avenue, ans the front wheel of a bike could easily go down into the drain cover, throwing a cyclist off their bike.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Crescent, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large suitcase has been dumped in bin cupboard, 16th May
item.description:
Somebody put a huge suitcase in a bin store. It's been there for a week now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10-18, Staveley Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: It’s the whole way along spaniards road, 16th May
item.description:
The cycle lane going one way is getting completely obscured by soil matter and plants, because no one has gone to clear it off. This is causing a problem because the oncoming cyclists are being forced into the pedestrian section of the pavement which might cause a collision. Could you send a team up there to clean it up please? Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Spaniards Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping next to St Joseph’s Catholic Church, 16th May
item.description:
There’s a large amount of fly tipping next to St Joseph’s Catholic Church. It’s been like that for quite some time and it seems a bit too much to clean by residents (I mean we could, but then why are we paying council tax for?).

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colomb Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin Chamber door is insecure Langley and Wallington Courts., 16th May
item.description:
These bin rooms of both courts are hotspot for rough sleeper as they use that opened bin room to sleep and use drugs please fix it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bradenham Close, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entrance door not getting locked., 16th May
item.description:
The door seems free to open up unsecured.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bradenham Close, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement Slaps lifted near The Ship on Elephant Lane, 16th May
item.description:
The pavement slaps are raised to create a trip hazard across most of the pavement. The issue is on the Elephant Lane side of The Ship pub

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39-47, St Marychurch Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on street, 16th May
item.description:
A garbage pile in the middle of the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Frampton Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tyres flytipped, 16th May
item.description:
Tyres flytipped on corner of footscray and bercta road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footscray Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard keeps being removed, 16th May
item.description:
The bollard protecting the LTN / cycle lane keeps getting unlocked and removed, allowing cars through the cycle lane. The person responsible clearly has an FB key which allows him/her to unlock the padlock. Can you make the bollard permanent and/or install a camera to enforce?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dalwood Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping moved - armchair, 16th May
item.description:
Reported first fly tipped outside 3 Macoma Road and now been moved at night to outside the hospice charity shop.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking restrictions signs covered with graffiti, 16th May
item.description:
All signs have been sprayed with black paint. Restrictions signs no longer legible
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Devonshire Drive, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead badger, 16th May
item.description:
There is a dead badger

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hockenden Lane, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
